_doc: Per-store-name overrides for Lululemon year_opened. Applied AFTER the 10-K-rank estimator. Each entry overrides year_opened with a web-search-confirmed value. Keyed by (name, country). Edit by hand to add corrections.

_.name: American Dream
_.source: ROI-NJ 2025/12 — opened December 2025, Alo's 7th NJ store at East Rutherford (also Lulu present)

_.name: Bridgewater Commons
_.source: patch.com — Bridgewater NJ store opened September 2025

_.name: Westfield London
_.source: Retail Gazette 2025/10 — Westfield London opens Nov 28, 2025

_country_corrections.name: Antwerp
_country_corrections.source: Lulu Dec 18, 2025 press release: Belgium is a recent franchise market. Original geocode of just 'Antwerp' returned a London street called 'Antwerp Way' instead of the actual city Antwerp, BE.

_country_corrections.name: Cologne
_country_corrections.source: Cologne (Köln) is a city in Germany. Original geocode of 'Cologne' returned a building named 'Cologne' in Rungis, France. Lulu DE had 9 stores throughout FY2022-FY2025; Cologne is part of that fleet.

_country_corrections.name: Zurich
_country_corrections.source: Zurich is in Switzerland. Original geocode of 'Zurich' returned 'Zürich Strasse' in Frankfurt. Lulu CH has had 1 store throughout FY2019-FY2025; this is that store, debut estimated 2017 alongside DE.
